review.notes: The OCR also contains adjacent-column noise from an NHL playoff roundup piece (Neil Stevens / Canadian Press), but the primary Sockeyes-relevant article — about ex-Sockeye Dave Tomlinson and the Moncton Hawks — is correctly identified and described. The draft headline is a reasonable paraphrase; no verbatim headline appears in the OCR, so it stands. Byline "By Dwayne Tingley Sports Editor" matches the OCR. The detail that Tomlinson spent part of the season with the Winnipeg Jets (his NHL parent club) is noteworthy context not captured in the draft, but the draft is otherwise accurate and within scope.
